suite.name: pwmOUT Test

test.name: Verify LED Recieves 50 PWM DutyCycle

kw.name: Set Pwm Duty Cycle
kw.doc: This Python function becomes a Robot Keyword!

test.doc: Simulate a 50% PWM Signal and Check if the the External Hardwar Reacts

test.name: Give Wrong Dutycycle

kw.name: Run Keyword And Expect Error
Set Pwm Duty Cycle
kw.msg: Test Bench rejected command! Response: pwm_out set 1 200 Invalid Duty Cycle available DutyCycle 0~100 [1;32mblackpill:~$ [m
kw.doc: This Python function becomes a Robot Keyword!
kw.status: Test Bench rejected command! Response: pwm_out set 1 200 Invalid Duty Cycle available DutyCycle 0~100 [1;32mblackpill:~$ [m

kw.doc: Runs the keyword and checks that the expected error occurred.

test.doc: Simulate a 200% DutyCycle and check if it throws an error.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Expect Error
Set Pwm Duty Cycle
kw.msg: Test Bench rejected command! Response: pwm_out set 5 50 Invalid PWM Channel Available Channels are 1 and 2 [1;32mblackpill:~$ [m
kw.doc: This Python function becomes a Robot Keyword!
kw.status: Test Bench rejected command! Response: pwm_out set 5 50 Invalid PWM Channel Available Channels are 1 and 2 [1;32mblackpill:~$ [m

kw.doc: Runs the keyword and checks that the expected error occurred.

test.name: Stop PWM Signal Safely

kw.name: Set Pwm Duty Cycle
kw.doc: This Python function becomes a Robot Keyword!

test.doc: Ensure the PWM can be turned off.

suite.doc: Testing the PWM Output capabilities of the HIL Bench.
